scripts.dev:server: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm --prefix ServerConnect run dev
scripts.dev:client: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm --prefix ClientConnect run dev
scripts.dev:seq: start-server-and-test "npm run dev:server" http-get://localhost:3000 "npm run dev:client"
scripts.local:setup: npm run local:mongo && echo 'MongoDB started! Now run: npm run local:dev'
